description: Auditor binding spec for the content-provenance re-derivation (Axis-2 spec-pinned dispatch). The representative re-derived output is the SHA-256 hex digest of the published content bytes (artifact/content.txt), i.e. content_sha = hashlib.sha256(content_bytes).hexdigest(). The hashing rule lives in the verifier primitive (content_provenance_recompute); the comparator is pinned HERE by the auditor as exact (byte-exact string equality), not producer-asserted. A producer who ships a weaker spec gets a SHA the anchor does not list, so dispatch fails closed. SCOPE: this re-derives WHAT bytes were published and that they are unaltered since signing; it is NOT truth-detection.
